title: taraxacum arvernum
intro: Taraxacum arvernum, also known as the French dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, native to the mountainous regions of France and the Mediterranean. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. The health benefits of Taraxacum arvernum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. Taraxacum arvernum can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy digestion.
